name: Doxycycline may antagonize amoxicillin activity
actions: Use caution when doxycycline is combined with amoxicillin.
Consider whether combined antibacterial strategy is appropriate for the clinical context (educational).

rationale: Doxycycline is bacteriostatic and may antagonize the bactericidal activity of amoxicillin.
Combined use may reduce antibacterial efficacy in some contexts.

explanation_template: {A_name} may antagonize the antibacterial activity of {B_name} in some contexts.
